rows.label: qev041306_MSG0001
rows.name:
The food you gave me was really delicious-mo.
Now that my stomach is full...
I'm going to go buy more Miracolle-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041306_MSG0002
rows.name:
I... if things stay like this,
my stomach is going to keep rumbling until I collapse-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041306_MSG0003
rows.name:
It can't be helped-mo...
2 Meteor Eaters and
5 Coaretri...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041306_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you have those, along with a Vasalt Card
or an Aranea Card, I'll trade you this
extremely rare Silver Folium Card-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041306_MSG0005
rows.name:
...What-mo? You don't have them-mo?
Then I can't trade with you-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041306_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'm so grateful-mo...
Pirapira spent way too much money on Miracolle
and couldn't afford to eat meals anymore-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041306_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'll be careful from now on-mo...
Here, take the
Silver Folium Card-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041306_MSG0011
rows.name:
Is even a rare item like this no good-mo?
Uugh... my stomach is rumbling-mo...[ST:wait ]
